response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience, including recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's cloud and GenAI focus. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks. His background in TypeScript and cloud platforms is relevant, but direct experience with AI-specific technologies is unclear.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with leadership experience (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq)
Recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, including MCP and developer tooling
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of requests)
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks
Limited visible experience with Python (primary required language) in recent roles
No clear evidence of LLM performance metrics or optimization techniques
